metadata.description: Nemonemo — marketplace personal de plugins de Claude Code.

plugins.name: nemo-commit
plugins.description: Git workflow commands: /commit (smart commit), /commit-push-pr (branch → commit → push → PR), /clean-gone (remove stale branches), /release (marketplace release with version bumps).

plugins.name: nemo-security
plugins.description: Security reminder hook: warns about potential security issues (command injection, XSS, eval, pickle, etc.) when editing files. Passive, low overhead.

plugins.name: nemo-deepthink
plugins.description: Structured deep-thinking protocol invoked via /deepthink — pre-filled 7-slot interview, audit-ready response with red-team, pre-mortem, and assumption audit.

plugins.name: nemo-deep-review
plugins.description: Specialized review: 5 deep-review agents (test coverage, silent failures, type design, comments, simplification) + automated PR review with inline GitHub comments.
